tasks.label: dream-studio: Onboard Project
tasks.detail: Run the studio-onboard workflow — assess and adopt project assets into dream-studio

tasks.label: dream-studio: Research Feature
tasks.detail: Run the feature-research workflow — deep research + native integration strategy

tasks.label: dream-studio: Idea → PR
tasks.detail: Run the idea-to-pr workflow — spec, plan, implement, and ship

tasks.label: dream-studio: Fix Issue
tasks.detail: Run the fix-issue workflow — diagnose and resolve a bug or ticket

tasks.label: dream-studio: Hotfix
tasks.detail: Run the hotfix workflow — fast-track critical fix straight to production

tasks.label: dream-studio: Safe Refactor
tasks.detail: Run the safe-refactor workflow — test-guarded structural improvements

tasks.label: dream-studio: Comprehensive Review
tasks.detail: Run the comprehensive-review workflow — full code, security, and architecture review

tasks.label: dream-studio: Project Audit
tasks.detail: Run the project-audit workflow — health, debt, security, and gap analysis

tasks.label: dream-studio: Prototype
tasks.detail: Run the prototype workflow — rapid proof-of-concept build

tasks.label: dream-studio: Game Feature
tasks.detail: Run the game-feature workflow — design and implement a game mechanic or system

tasks.label: dream-studio: /plan
tasks.detail: Structured planning skill — break down a task into a sequenced implementation plan

tasks.label: dream-studio: /debug
tasks.detail: Systematic debugging skill — isolate root cause and produce a minimal fix

tasks.label: dream-studio: /build
tasks.detail: Structured build skill — implement a feature from spec to working code

tasks.label: dream-studio: /ship
tasks.detail: Ship skill — lint, build, commit, and push with pre-push validation

tasks.label: dream-studio: /review
tasks.detail: Code review skill — quality, correctness, and style analysis

tasks.label: dream-studio: /secure
tasks.detail: Security review skill — OWASP, secrets, injection, and auth checks

tasks.label: dream-studio: /harden
tasks.detail: Hardening skill — tighten error handling, validation, and edge cases

tasks.label: dream-studio: /analyze
tasks.detail: Analysis skill — deep dive into a dataset, system, or codebase

tasks.label: dream-studio: /handoff
tasks.detail: Handoff skill — write a structured cross-session context document

tasks.label: dream-studio: /recap
tasks.detail: Recap skill — summarize what was accomplished in this session

tasks.label: dream-studio: /learn
tasks.detail: Learn skill — capture a lesson from this session into draft-lessons

tasks.label: dream-studio: Compact Context
tasks.detail: Run /compact — compress conversation context to extend the session

tasks.label: dream-studio: Pulse Check
tasks.detail: Print the latest pulse report from ~/.dream-studio/meta/pulse-latest.json
args: import json,pathlib; p=pathlib.Path.home()/'.dream-studio/meta/pulse-latest.json'; print(json.dumps(json.loads(p.read_text()),indent=2)) if p.exists() else print('No pulse report found.')
